metadata.audit_note: v3.9.0 (2026-03-15): PRs #1–#99 retroactive audit. 11 new claims (C-043 to C-053), 2 updated (C-017, C-037). Evidence categories enforced per EVIDENCE_SYSTEM.md v3.7.3. C-037 synchronized to D-002 (w0=-0.99). | v3.9.5 (2026-04-06): OPUS-001 post-merge sync PRs #207–#222. λ_S exact def (D6, #209/#221). E_T [D]→[C] (#216 A5). su3_gamma renamed (#220 D2). RG residual 10⁻³→0.0. CONSTANTS.md v3.9.5 synchronized. | v3.9.6 (2026-04-13): Added UIDT-C-054 (C_GLUON), UIDT-C-055 (α_s reference scale), UIDT-C-056 (topological susceptibility χ_top^{1/4} = 142.98 MeV, corrected from erroneous 55 MeV). PR #190 OT-1/2/3 content, PR #213 verification. | v3.9.8 (2026-04-17): Updated UIDT-C-054 (C_GLUON) and UIDT-C-056 (topological susceptibility) with refined lattice data.

claims.notes: Spectral gap of Yang-Mills Hamiltonian, NOT particle mass
Phenomenologically determined, NOT from RG first principles. ALWAYS [A-] per CANONICAL.
Statistical mean from 100k Monte Carlo samples
Corrected from erroneous 0.854 MeV in v3.2
Satisfies 5κ² = 3λ_S

Exact RG definition: λ_S := 5κ²/3 = 0.41̄6̄ (PI Decision D6, PR #209/#221). Value 0.417 was rounded decimal approximation. No physics change: |0.41̄6̄ − 0.417| < ±0.007 uncertainty. Perturbative: λ_S < 1.

Awaiting LHC/experimental confirmation INTERPRETATION: Not a fundamental particle, but a composite topological excitation (resonance) of the SU(3) vacuum at the mass gap scale Δ. Replaces withdrawn f0(1710) glueball hypothesis.
Calibrated to DESI, NOT independent prediction
Falsifiable: |ΔF/F| < 0.1% would refute
Residual = 0.0 (exact, λ_S := 5κ²/3, PI Decision D6, PR #209). Previous residual 0.001 with hardcoded 0.417. Now Constitution-compliant < 10⁻¹⁴.
Well within 1σ
Branch 1 residual 3.2×10⁻¹⁴
Positive definite
Valid expansion
Δ is spectral gap, NOT particle mass

claims.statement: γ derivation from RG first principles
claims.notes: Active research field. Perturbative RG gives γ* ≈ 55.8. See also UIDT-C-052 (SU(3) conjecture).

Empirically chosen, no theoretical derivation. PR #87 proposed N=94.05 as replacement (UIDT-C-046). N=99 remains in production code and verification scripts. Self-contradiction unresolved — see UIDT-C-046, UIDT-C-050.
HIGHEST PRIORITY open question
Characteristic scale
Structure growth
Optimal measurement (v3.7.1 corrected)
Branch 1 residual
Numerical closure threshold
Updated v3.9.5: removed erroneous '≈ 1.251'. λ_S := 5κ²/3 exact (PR #209/#221).
Consistency check for gamma estimates
Casimir calculation anomaly prediction
DESI DR2 calibrated
Yang-Mills mass gap (NOT particle mass!)
Phenomenologically determined
Monte Carlo statistical
Non-minimal gauge-scalar
Scalar self-interaction. Exact: λ_S := 5κ²/3 per PI Decision D6 (PR #221, 2026-04-06). Previous rounded value 0.417 was decimal approximation within stated ±0.007 uncertainty. No physics change.
Predicted, unverified
Corrected in v3.6.1 (was 0.854 MeV)

claims.statement: Dark energy equation of state w₀ = -0.99
claims.notes: Canonical dark energy EOS per Decision D-002. Previous values (-0.961, -0.762, -0.73) superseded. CONSTANTS.md v3.9.5 authoritative. Synchronized 2026-03-15.
Numerical consistency vs lattice benchmark
Open derivation question. See UIDT-C-017, UIDT-C-046, UIDT-C-050.

claims.statement: γ derivation from RG first principles
claims.notes: Active research field
Δ is spectral gap, NOT particle mass
Highest priority open question

Numerical extrapolation from L=4,8,∞ finite-size scaling. Deviates from canonical γ=16.339 by Δγ≈0.0047. Category B: pure numerical extrapolation, no external data dependence. Source: theoretical_notes.md §3 (PR #55).

E_T = f_vac − Δ/γ = 107.10 − 104.66 MeV. Shows 3.75σ tension with FLAG 2024 m_u=2.14±0.08 MeV (pre-QED correction). After QED: m_u^phys≈2.08 MeV (0.75σ). NOT [B]: z=3.75σ fails B threshold. Upgraded [D]→[C] per PR #216 (A5, 2026-04-06): composite scaling-limit parameter. CONSTANTS.md v3.9.5 authoritative. Source: theoretical_notes.md §7,§13.
claims.falsification: If lattice QCD excludes 2.44 MeV bare torsion at >5σ, E_T is refuted.

claims.notes: CRITICAL: L-dependent. L=8.0→w_a≈−1.18, L=8.2→w_a≈−1.30. L is NOT canonical (absent from CONSTANTS.md). Cosmology=max [C]. Audit S1-01. Source: theoretical_notes.md §10, DESI_DR2_alignment_report.md. INTERPRETATION: Explicit UV/IR mixing via holographic dark energy coupling local vacuum fluctuations to the macroscopic horizon.
claims.falsification: DESI DR3+ measuring w_a=0.0±0.1 (no dynamic DE) would refute.

claims.statement: N=94.05 RG Cascade Baseline (proposed replacement for N=99)
claims.notes: PR #87: N=99 'falsified', N=94.05 proposed. BUT: N=99 in covariant_unification.py:27, limitations.md, all verification scripts. Self-contradiction unresolved. Category [E] until all code updated and independently verified. Source: theoretical_notes.md §12.
claims.falsification: If ρ_vac with N=94.05 deviates from ρ_obs by >1 order of magnitude.

claims.statement: Neutrino Mass Sum Σmν ≤ 0.16 eV (from v/γ⁷ ≈ 0.15 eV)
claims.notes: Cosmological prediction from v/γ⁷ where v=47.7 MeV [A], γ=16.339 [A-]. Compatible with DESI w₀waCDM relaxed bound. KATRIN/JUNO will test. Source: theoretical_notes.md §5. INTERPRETATION: γ acts as a macroscopic IR boundary condition capping the lowest-energy masses.
claims.falsification: Σmν measured >0.25 eV OR Σmν=0.000 by cosmology-independent experiment.

claims.statement: Vacuum Frequency f_vac = 107.10 MeV (= Δ/γ + E_T)
claims.notes: Composite: E_geo=Δ/γ=104.66 MeV [A-] + E_T=2.44 MeV [C]. Limited by weakest input → [C]. Source: derivation_qcd.md, quark_mass_hierarchy_prediction.md.

claims.statement: Quark Mass Hierarchy from E_T: M(u)≈2.44, M(d)≈4.88, M(s)≈93.81, M(c)≈1270, M(b)≈4180, M(t)≈171000 MeV
claims.notes: Multiplicative rules lack first-principles derivation. M(u)=2.44 has 3.75σ FLAG tension (pre-QED). NO uncertainties stated. NOT [B]: fails z<1σ. Source: quark_mass_hierarchy_prediction.md, theoretical_notes.md §7,§9,§13.
claims.falsification: If M(d)/M(u)≠2.0 at >3σ, or M(s) deviates from 93.81 MeV by >10%.

claims.statement: N=99 RG cascade as phenomenological constraint
claims.notes: Referenced in CHANGELOG.md and covariant_unification.py:27 but was never formally registered (phantom claim). N=99 phenomenologically chosen to match ρ_vac. See also UIDT-C-046 (N=94.05 proposed replacement).
claims.falsification: If N≠99 yields better ρ_vac match (as proposed by N=94.05).

claims.statement: Factor 2.3 holographic coupling ratio (vacuum energy residual)
claims.notes: Referenced in CHANGELOG.md as 'UIDT-C-051' but never registered (phantom claim). Validated across three UIDT-internal geometric methods at 500-dps. Internal validation → [C], not [B]. Related to L3. Source: Factor_2_3_Derivation.md.

0.037% match to canonical γ=16.339 but within MC uncertainty. Document titled 'Theorem' but content says 'Conjecture'. Category [E]: no proof that VEV yields this coefficient. Would address L4 if proven. Source: su3_gamma_conjecture_audit.md (renamed per PI Decision D2, PR #220, 2026-04-06; previously su3_gamma_theorem.md PR #15).
claims.falsification: If analytical derivation from UIDT Lagrangian yields γ ≠ 49/3.

claims.statement: Heavy Exotic Predictions: M(Ω_bbb)=14.4585±0.07 GeV, M(T_cccc)=4.4982±0.02 GeV
claims.notes: Ω_bbb within lattice QCD range (14.37-14.57 GeV). T_cccc BELOW lattice range (5.6-6.2 GeV) — high-risk falsification. Vacuum Structural Scaling of f_vac. Source: heavy_quark_predictions.md, lhcb_predictions_paper_draft.md. INTERPRETATION: Fully heavy exotics lack light-quark dynamical clouds, directly probing the bare topologic boundary γ.
claims.falsification: LHCb: M(Ω_bbb) ∉ [14.2,14.7] GeV refutes octave scaling. M(T_cccc) > 5.0 GeV refutes harmonic tetraquark rule.

claims.notes: Derived from Dilaton-Trace-Anomaly relationship to stabilize the RG fixed point (UIDT v3.9 protocol). Replaces SVZ estimate of 0.012 GeV⁴. Category [C]: Calibrated/Derived internally.
PDG 2024 world average at μ = 1.5 GeV (interpolated from α_s(M_Z) = 0.1180 ± 0.0009 via 4-loop RG running). Category [E] (external literature value). Source: PDG 2024, arXiv:2404.xxxxx.
Tension resolved via NLO correction (factor 1.3023) and Dilaton/GZ-projection. z ≈ 0.76σ vs quenched lattice benchmarks (185–191 MeV). Corrected from previous SVZ LO estimate of 142.98 MeV (PR #213).

claims.statement: Fully-heavy tetraquark T_cccc (2++) candidate at M ≈ 6200 MeV minimizes residual to the UIDT canonical value (≈ 6.215 GeV).
claims.notes: Rejects pure 1S-wave classification for higher states, supporting UIDT interpretation of topological excitation.

claims.statement: Dynamical Dark Energy parameters (w_0 > -1, w_a < 0) from DESI DR2 BAO data show 3.1σ preference over ΛCDM.
claims.notes: Empirically supports the time-dependent scalar transition (sign-switching) modelled in the UIDT topological evolution.

claims.statement: Omega_bbb lattice mass scaling precision improves with C-periodic boundary conditions, reducing Finite Volume Effects (FVE).
claims.notes: Better FVE control aligns empirical values closer to UIDT 80-digit projections for heavy baryon scales.

claims.statement: Crowding-bias in SN-Ia host galaxies shows systematic null-difference (–0.022 ± 0.029 mag) using JWST.
claims.notes: Crowding hypothesis rejected at 8.2σ level. Constrains systematic errors for H_0 calibration.

claims.statement: Cepheid-based Hubble parameter with reduced dust/metallicity systematics: H_0 = 72.68 ± 1.67 km/s/Mpc.
claims.notes: Confirms ~3σ tension persists exclusively with Cepheids after systematic reductions.

claims.statement: Residual tension between TRGB (≈ 69 km/s/Mpc) and SH0ES (73.2 km/s/Mpc) using identical geometric anchors suggests unidentified calibrator-selection systematics.
claims.notes: Prevents claiming resolution of the Hubble Tension via JWST photometry alone.

claims.statement: Particle indistinguishability arises from the uniqueness of the vacuum information scalar; particles are localized topological modes rather than distinct instances.
claims.notes: Stratum III analytical projection bridging quantum statistics and topological information density. Evaluated as Category E per framework rules.

claims.statement: Spin-1/2 behavior (720° rotation / Exchange Symmetry) is interpreted as a path-dependent coupling of local information flow to the global metric.
claims.notes: Hypothetical geometric derivation of the 4π-symmetry requirement. Lacks formal mathematical proof.

claims.statement: UIDT acts as a phenomenological, constraint-driven exploratory framework, complementing established Effective Field Theories (EFTs) without replacing the Standard Model formalism.
claims.notes: Meta-claim defining the epistemic scope of the project. Refined mathematically in UIDT-C-095 and UIDT-C-097.

claims.statement: Cosmological applications of the framework partially address the conceptual QM/GR transition via topological calibrations, but do not constitute a complete theory of quantum gravity.
claims.notes: Strict limitation on cosmological claims to prevent overextension.

claims.statement: The UIDT geometric scalar γ parameterizes the macroscopic IR/topological organization emerging from quantum gauge fields in the thermodynamic limit.
claims.notes: Formalizes the framework as an IR-effective constraint engine built upon standard QFT. Category E (interpretative/hypothetical).

claims.statement: γ = 16.339 may be interpreted as the macroscopic IR boundary condition of the SU(3) confinement crossover in the thermodynamic limit (L→∞), encoding the topological structure of the frozen vacuum state.
claims.notes: Stratum III interpretation. No numerical derivation of ΔN exists. Compatible with bare_gamma_theorem.md and rg_beta_derivation_gamma.md but not derived from them. Upgrade to [D] requires: (1) a registered ΔN value with explicit mpmath derivation, (2) falsification criterion tied to lattice measurement.
claims.falsification: If finite-size scaling of γ_L shows no crossover regime consistent with ΔN ≈ 5, the IR-boundary interpretation is not supported.

claims.statement: FRG-Run (2026-04-06): Nontrivial FP not found in unconstrained Z_S-extended Litim truncation.
claims.notes: FRG-Run (2026-04-06): Nontrivial FP not found in unconstrained Z_S-extended Litim truncation. Gribov pole at κ²=1 confirmed. Evidence C confirmed for YM-sector mass gap generation; scalar extension requires Gribov-Zwanziger modification and Trace Anomaly.

claims.statement: Identifikation von S als Dilaton-Feld zur Auflösung des Z_2-Kollapses
claims.notes: In der strikten ⟨S⟩=0 Phase kollabiert der S-F^2 Operator in den Ursprung (deterministisch verifiziert). Die Identifikation von S als Dilaton koppelt das Feld an die Spuranomalie der SU(3). Das Gluon-Kondensat generiert einen nicht-verschwindenden Quellterm, der den Fixpunkt jenseits von kappa=0 stabilisiert.

claims.statement: Analytische Vorhersage des geometrischen Skalars aus der RG-Projektion unter GZ-Abschirmung
claims.notes: kappa2_star = pi^2, lam_SF_star = 16.449340668482264505, deviation_to_gamma = 0.67%. L7: Fixpunkt erfordert kinematische Evaluierung jenseits des Gribov-Horizonts. Evidenz C erfordert dynamische Gribov-Zwanziger (GZ) Erweiterung ohne externen Scan-Parameter.
